raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo teem Israëla Behr- 
ceem/ un teem Lewja Behrneem 
uhs Pazelschanas-Uppuru/Lab- 
ibun / Wihnu un Etji Kamba- 
rôs nest : Kur arridsan tahs 
wehtas Weetas Trauki trraid/ 
n tee Preesteri/ kas tur falpo/ 
n Wahrtu-Sargi/ un Dseeda- 
taji/ ka mehß muhsu Deewa 
Namnu ne attahjam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XI. Nodalla.
To paschu Pulks un Wahrdi/ kas Jerusaleme 
dsihwofchi/ pehz tahs Uteefchanas no Ba- 
beles : I. etc.
N to Lauschu Wirtnee- 
cki dsihwoja Jerusaleme/ 
bet tee zitti Laudis mes- 
lojahs weenn no Definiteem is- 
affiht/ kas Jerusaleme ta sweb- 
ta Pilsfahta dsihwotu / un de- 
win Dalkas zittos Pilsfahtos.
2. Un tee Laudis swehtija wif- 
fus/ kas ar labbu Prahtu apneb- 
mahs Jerusaleme dsihwoht.
3. Un tchee irr tahs Walstas 
Wirfneeki/ kas Jerusaleme dsih- 
woja. Bet eekich teem Juhda 
Pilsfahteem dsihwoja ikweens 
uhs fawn eemantotu Teefu / kas 
winnu Pilsfahtos bija/ Israëls/ 
tee Preestert un tee Lewiti/ un 
tee Netinim / un tee Behrni to 
Kalpu Salamanza.
4. Tad dsihwoja Jerusaleme 
(zitti) no Juhda Behrneem/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Maësejus / Bahruka 
Dehls/ ta Dehla Kol Osus/ ta 
Dehla Asajus/ ta Dehla Ada- 
jus/ ta Dehla Jojariba/ ta Deh- 
la Sakarijus/ ta Dehla Silo- 
nus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiffo Pareza Behrum / 
kas Jerusaleme dsihtwoja / bija 
tschetrsints/ fetschdetmits un a- 
stoni stipri Wihri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un schee irr Benjamina 
Behrni / Sallus / Mesullama 
Dehls/ ta Dehla Joeda/ ta Deh- 
la Pedajus/ ta Dehla Kolajus/ 
ta Dehla Maësejus/ ta Dehla 
Jtiëta/ ta Dehla Jesajus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz teem Gabajus/ 
Sallajus/ dewinsints diwider- 
nits un astoni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Joels / Sikrus Dehls 
bija Uhersungs pahr teem/ un 
Juhda/ Asnuus Dehls/ bija tas 
ohtrs ( Walditajs ) pahr to 
Pilsfahtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no teem Preestereem 
Jedajus/ Jojariba Dehls Ja-
kins.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Serajus/ Ilkijus Dehls/ 
ta Dehla Mesullama/ ta Dehla 
Zadaka/ ta Dehla Merajota/ ta 
Dehla Akitoba/ bija ta Deewa 
Namna Wirfneeks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Brahtu/kas to 
Darbu Namna darrija / bija 
Eçççç ç aston-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
